_readme: Copy this file to secrets.json, fill in your real values, and NEVER commit secrets.json to git.
_project: MyLLM — Personal AI Stack on Mac

docker._notes: Used by docker-compose.yml for Open WebUI + SearXNG

google_oauth._notes: Required for Gmail AI Manager + Google Calendar integration. Download from https://console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs
_how_to_get: 3. Enable: Gmail API + Google Calendar API
4. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop app type)

meta_facebook._notes: Required for Tax AI Social — auto-posting to Facebook & Instagram
_how_to_get: 3. Add Facebook Login + Instagram Graph API products
4. Generate long-lived Page Access Token via Graph API Explorer
5. Get your Facebook Page ID from Page About section
6. Get Instagram Business Account ID via Graph API

tax_ai_social._notes: Copy these into tax-ai-social/.env — see tax-ai-social/.env.example for full template

stable_diffusion._notes: No API keys needed — runs 100% locally using HuggingFace models downloaded on first run
stable_diffusion._huggingface_how_to: https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens — free account, read token only

whisper_stt._notes: No API keys needed — runs 100% locally using OpenAI Whisper model downloaded on first run

quant_ai._notes: No API keys required for basic use — Yahoo Finance is used by default (free, no key)

ollama._notes: No API keys needed — runs 100% locally

searxng._notes: Used in docker-compose.yml as SEARXNG_SECRET environment variable

REQUIRED_for_core_ai: None — Ollama + Open WebUI run with no keys
